intro: Cleistes bifaria, also known as the twisted hat orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cleistes bifaria include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities.
